source: DFIMS — Development Finance Information Management System, Ministry of Finance, Government of Nepal
dfims_expenditure_caveat: The displayed USD expenditure might not be precise as it's converted from NRB's API based on the synced date.
notes: DFIMS's own endpoints disagree: /core/project_count/ says 2923 while project_report says 2925 — we ship the ledger's own count.
id_note: report_row is the report's own row index; project_code is the DFIMS 'Project' number (unique). Whether project_code is the id the v1 per-project endpoints accept is UNVERIFIED.
